name: Cloverly Carbon Offset API
description: The Cloverly API calculates the impact of common carbon-intensive activities in real time and enables the purchase of carbon offsets to neutralize that impact. It supports estimates and purchases for shipping, vehicle transport, direct carbon weight, and currency-based offsets.
